evals.prompt: RFC 0012 is approved and merged. Repo uses .spec/ROADMAP.md and .spec/TASK_TRACKING.md. What files do you touch?
evals.expected_output: Move RFC to .spec/rfc/completed/; .spec/ROADMAP.md status Implemented; .spec/TASK_TRACKING.md items checked done; no README indexes; same change set.

evals.prompt: linglong-marketplace: propose RFC 0004 for a notification bridge. Only ROADMAP and TASK_TRACKING under .spec/.
evals.expected_output: .spec/ROADMAP.md index row Draft; create .spec/rfc/0004-….md with spec sections only; .spec/TASK_TRACKING.md tasks with RFC 0004; no .spec/README or rfc/README; no tasks inside RFC body.

evals.prompt: User wants to implement RFC 0003. Which skill first?
evals.expected_output: Confirm Approved in .spec/ROADMAP.md; then rfc-workflow for implementation; after merge rfc-management Playbook C for Implemented and .spec/TASK_TRACKING.md.
